title: Hydrogen fuel cell schematic
description: Schematic of hydrogen fuel cell showing the electrochemical reaction that produces water, heat, and electrical current. Inputs of hydrogen and oxygen are also shown.
author: Emma Ambrogi
attribution_md:
Hydrogen fuel cell schematic
Schematic of hydrogen fuel cell showing the electrochemical reaction that produces water, heat, and electrical current. Inputs of hydrogen and oxygen are also shown.

Image: Emma Ambrogi ([source](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Hydrogen_fuel_cell_schematic.jpg))
